name: vault-light
description: Opinionated companion for Obsidian-style vaults: wikilinks, backlinks, daily notes, a styled Markdown preview, and an optional semantic-search bridge.

commands.title: Vault: Open Markdown Preview to Side

editor/title.when: resourceLangId == markdown || resourceLangId == prompt || resourceLangId == instructions || resourceLangId == chatagent || resourceLangId == skill

vaultLight.vsPath.description: Path to the `vs` semantic-search CLI. Resolved against $PATH.

vaultLight.vsTimeoutMs.description: Hard timeout for any `vs` invocation, in milliseconds.

vaultLight.dailyNotesFolder.description: Folder under the vault root where daily notes are created.

vaultLight.dailyNoteTemplate.description: Template for new daily notes. Placeholders: {date}, {iso}, {weekday}.

vaultLight.copilotBooster.enabled.description: EXPERIMENTAL: silently load wikilink neighbors of the active file into workspace.textDocuments so Copilot has them as context. Off by default; unclear whether Copilot's inline-completion heuristic actually reads silent-loaded documents. Use workspace.openTextDocument under the hood (no UI changes).

vaultLight.copilotBooster.maxNeighbors.description: Maximum number of neighbor files to open as preview tabs per active file.

vaultLight.copilotBooster.depth.description: Traversal depth for neighbor preloading. 1 = direct wikilinks only.

vaultLight.hover.augmentWithVs.description: Append top-3 vs semantic neighbors to wikilink hover popups.

vaultLight.ignorePatterns.description: Glob patterns excluded from the workspace index. Also reads .gitignore and .ignore at vault root.

vaultLight.perfLog.description: Log timings for hot paths to the Vault Light output channel.

scripts.lint: eslint src --ext ts && prettier --check src test
scripts.lint:fix: eslint src --ext ts --fix && prettier --write src test
